pattern: Accumulating each source label into the score of its single target reduces the problem to one pass plus an argmax over scores.
hints: Every node points at exactly one target, so just add the source's index to that target's running total.
Use an array of scores sized to the number of nodes and add i to scores[edges[i]] for each i.
Scan the scores once, keeping the index of the largest, and on ties keep the smaller index by only replacing on a strict increase.

edge_inputs.description: two nodes pointing at each other
all point to the same node
every node aims at node zero except itself
high-index sources make a later node win
largest score from few but high-label sources

stress.description: large random functional graph with no self loops
